title: Plants&Junk
description:
Mod has been merged! - https://modrinth.com/mod/jaizmod
This is to keep the work load down for myself, and keep updates coming!

This mod implements several new plant types, a new wood type, and new entities to add to the ambience of your world
body:
Mod has been merged! - https://modrinth.com/mod/jaizmod
This is to keep the work load down for myself, and keep updates coming!

This mod adds several new ambience based features to the game

- New biome generation
- 4 New entities, the butterfly, caterpillar, firefly, and dragonfly
- New wood type, rotten wood
- Several new plants, such as shelf mushrooms, and callalilies
- Ground and tree plant cover
- New tree generation, branches and etc.
